channel.title: 2026-03-18 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-03-18 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Superconductivity via Paramagnon and Magnon Exchange in a 2D Near-Ferromagnetic Full Metal and Ferromagnetic Half-Metal
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. X
👤 Zachary M. Raines and Andrey V. Chubukov
Author(s): Zachary M. Raines and Andrey V. Chubukov Theoretical analysis of two-dimensional electron systems shows that magnon-mediated interactions drive robust p -wave superconductivity within a ferromagnetically order state at a temperature significantly higher than in a paramagnetic state. [Phys. Rev. X 16, 011059] Published Wed Mar 18, 2026
